metadata.description: A collection of useful Claude Code skills that I use in my work daily.

plugins.name: bix-github
plugins.description: GitHub PR workflow skills — describe, review (with optional parallel agents), and resolve review comments.

plugins.name: bix-session
plugins.description: Load context from a previous Claude Code session into the current one — compact summary or full transcript, with smart template auto-selection.

plugins.name: bix-utils
plugins.description: Everyday productivity skills — security audit, ~/.claude cleanup, and prompt rewriting via curated frameworks.
